text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uugh... I'm finished. I don't have the right to enter
in any more races.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm hurting your reputation as a trainer too.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Uugh. I'm so sorry, I really am!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll completely understand if you want to abandon
me—I'm an absolute failure, anyway!
choice_data_list: You need to abandon that negativity!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uugh... Are you really sure you don't mind dealing
with someone like me?
choice_data_list: Things will turn out okay, don't worry.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Thank you for treating me so kindly... I
don't deserve it...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Okay... I'll do my best, o-one step at a time. Just
you wait and see, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! If I'm not supposed to give up... then I
won't be beat!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I want to win... Trainer, I want to win!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll stop my whining! I ask that you work out a
s-s-strict training regimen for me, please!
